title: Sandhiya Sandhiya Lyrics Ninaivirukkum Varai
stanzas:
Sandhiya Sandhiya
sammadatham solvaayaa
Sandhiya Sandhiya
sanjalam kolvaayaa

en nenjin aasai sollavaa
oh o o o o.
nenjodu moodi kollavaa

Sandhiya Sandhiya
sammadatham solvaayaa
en nenjin aasai sollavaa

gangaiya nee kaanalaa
idhu kadhalaa
verum nesamaa

verkalaa nee pookkalaa
en vennilaa
badhil pesumaa

sollaadha sollukku
porul ondrum kidaiyaadhu.
naan konda nesathin
niram enna theriyaadhu.
oh ho oo o o o

Sandhiya Sandhiya
sammadatham solvaayaa
en nenjin aasai sollavaa

kadhale en kadhale
oru oomaiyaai
enai maatrinaai

megamaai naan vazhnthavan
thani theevile
enai poottinaai.

vidikaalai neraththil
kuyilukku urchchaagm
edhir kooval kelaamal
en nenjil oru sogam.
oh o oh o o o

Sandhiya Sandhiya
sammadatham solvaayaa
Sandhiya Sandhiya
sanjalam kolvaayaa

en nenjin aasai sollavaa
oh o ho o o o.
nenjodu moodi kollavaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Sandhiya Sandhiya expresses feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

In which movie does this song appear?

The movie for Sandhiya Sandhiya is currently unknown.

Who are the singer and music director of the song?

The singer and music director for Sandhiya Sandhiya are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

Sandhiya Sandhiya was released on February 5, 1999.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sandhiya Sandhiya beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and yearning. Its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create a nostalgic atmosphere, making it perfect for romantic moments. The song conveys deep emotions, resonating with anyone who has experienced love. It serves as a reminder of the beauty and complexity of romantic relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sandhiya Sandhiya captures the essence of longing and love with its enchanting melody. The song's heartfelt lyrics resonate deeply, making it a timeless piece for romantic occasions. Experience the magic of this beautiful track that evokes emotions like no other.
stanzaMeanings: Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you say what is right? Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you create a bond?
Will you express the desires of my heart? Oh oh oh oh. Will you unite with my heart?
Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you say what is right? Will you express the desires of my heart?
Can you see the river? This is not just love, it's pure affection.
Will you not come? Will you not bloom? Will you speak to my moon?
Words that are not spoken have no meaning. I don't know the color of the love I hold. Oh ho oo o o o.
Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you say what is right? Will you express the desires of my heart?
Oh my love, you have changed me into a silence.
I have lived grandly, you have placed me in solitude.
In the time of dawn, the cuckoo sings without waiting for a reply, and there is a sorrow in my heart. Oh o oh o o o.
Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you say what is right? Sandhiya Sandhiya, will you create a bond?
Will you express the desires of my heart? Oh oh ho o o o. Will you unite with my heart?
